etymology.description: 竢(竢) (zhú, "to wait") combined historically with 果(果) (guǒ, "fruit") to signify the name of a specific fruit, 'jinzhu' or 'bamboo fruit'.
etymology.interpretation: Though 竢(竢) (zhú, 'to wait') does not intuitively relate to bamboo or fruit, historically, the term 竢果 was used to describe a fruit that ripens gradually, similar to bamboo growing over time. This association explains the compound word's meaning.
